name: sdlc-workflow
description: Complete SDLC plugin: 20 agents across 6 phases, 28 knowledge skills spanning planning/design/dev/test/deploy/ops plus utilities, 9 orchestrator commands. Build products with enforced linting, testing pyramid, SAST/SCA scanning, CI/CD gates, comprehensive documentation, and mattpocock skill integrations.
highlights: 28 knowledge skills: core SDLC + mattpocock integrations (PRD synthesis, TDD, diagnose, prototype, architecture refactor, etc.)
Code quality enforcement: linting, testing pyramid, SAST/SCA, CI/CD gates
